execution_forensics.noise_stop_problem: 71.9% of illiquid-regime stops hit in noise (57 historical trades)
execution_forensics.structural_gap: No snapshot_entry in trades.csv — slippage unmeasurable even when live

high_priority_findings.finding: evaluate_active_fixes() in auto_fix_pipeline.py is a TODO stub — treatment_wr is NEVER computed for any A/B rule. 47 rules perpetually have treatment_wr=None. No rule can ever auto-graduate without this implementation.
high_priority_findings.action: Implement evaluate_active_fixes(): split trades by gate hash (treatment vs control), compute WR for each group, write treatment_wr back to graduated_rules.json

high_priority_findings.finding: Bot offline 10.08 days (since 2026-04-23 22:17 UTC). Zero trade data. All A/B tests frozen. Circuit breaker engaged (4 consecutive losses).
high_priority_findings.action: Restart bot with RESTART_SOFT_START_4LOSS rule (now at gate=80%): 50% sizing, max 3x leverage for first 10 trades until 2 wins achieved

high_priority_findings.finding: 29 rules in rules_added_* sub-buckets were NOT in main rules list — signal pipeline was silently ignoring them. Merged 7 this run.
high_priority_findings.action: Add orphan check to hourly loop: if rule in any rules_added_* not in rules[], alert + merge

high_priority_findings.finding: SLIPPAGE_TRACKING_GAP: trades.csv has no snapshot_entry column. Even when bot runs, slippage is structurally unmeasurable.
high_priority_findings.action: Add snapshot_entry field to trade logging at signal time (before order execution). Also add fill_status column for partial fill tracking.

high_priority_findings.finding: BTC_SHORT at 70-79% confidence = worst loss bucket (orphan rule BTC_SHORT_CONF70_80_BLOCK, conf=90%). Night session 00-06 UTC: 19% WR on 27 trades, -$136.83 (catastrophic).
high_priority_findings.action: Add BTC_SHORT 70-79% confidence block to execution filter. Night session block already in NIGHT_session_pause (gate=100%) — verify it's wired.

high_priority_findings.finding: RULE_CONFLICT_SOL_SHORT: SOL_SHORT_full_block (gate=100%) makes SOL_SHORT_suspension_reversal_probe (gate=20%) ungatherable — probe has 0 trades to measure.
high_priority_findings.action: Human decision: lower SOL_SHORT_full_block to gate=80% to feed probe, OR merge probe exception into block rule. Added to PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW.

high_priority_findings.finding: EXIT_PROACTIVE_CLOSE_PRIORITY (conf=93%): 93.3% of SL hits may be preventable via proactive early close by Exit agent. Total recoverable losses unknown without live data.
high_priority_findings.action: Wire Exit agent recommendation to trigger early-close before SL hits. Measure: % of SL hits where Exit agent had flagged position.

high_priority_findings.finding: No cost_tracker.json — model optimization deferred. Static estimate: $0.0062/decision cycle.
high_priority_findings.action: Re-evaluate after 50 live trades when cost data becomes available.

next_run_focus: Collect fresh trade data (bot restart required)
Implement evaluate_active_fixes() — prerequisite for A/B system
Add snapshot_entry to trade logging for slippage measurement
Verify NIGHT_session_pause (gate=100%) is wired in execution
Wire BTC_SHORT 70-79% confidence block to execution filter
